name: agentdeck
description: Wrap PPT, PDF, HTML, or Markdown decks into one enhanced single-file HTML player.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @agentdeck/schema && npm run build -w @agentdeck/themes && npm run build -w @agentdeck/compat-profiles && npm run build -w @agentdeck/runtime && npm run build -w @agentdeck/cli && npm run build -w @agentdeck/skill
